calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Trian Roderick.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on May 1, 2017.
Defendant Trina Roderick's general denial to plaintiff's complaint was filed on August 17, 2017.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on December 1, 2017.
Declaration of Jeanette Ruff (Legal Specialist for plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC) in lieu personal testimony pursuant to CCP Section 98, was filed and served on February 28, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC, and against defendant Trina Roderick, as follows:

Principal - $1,560.27.
Costs - $284.50.
Total - $1,844.77.

Proposed Judgment After Court Trial was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
